title: Degraded mode — alert review with no service type or traffic pattern
code_snippet:
# Someone shared these alert rules without service context
- alert: HighErrorRate
  expr: rate(http_errors_total[5m]) / rate(http_requests_total[5m]) > 0.01
  for: 5m
expected_feedback: Degraded mode: no service type or traffic pattern provided. Cannot validate whether 1% error rate threshold is appropriate — on a 10-QPS service, this fires on a single error every 100 seconds; on a 10K-QPS service, it means 100 errors/sec. Flag: threshold requires traffic data to validate. Also: no severity label (routing unknown), no runbook_url. All threshold recommendations are conditional. Must NOT claim alert thresholds are correct without knowing traffic volume. Uncovered Risks must list all unknowns.
